side_effects.description: Melanotan I triggered return of cluster headaches after 8 years of remission

protocol_notes: User had been free from cluster headaches for 8 years prior to Melanotan I use. Reports 99% confidence that Melanotan I was the direct cause of cluster headache resurgence based on timing. Previously used 'heroic doses' to break cluster cycles. Currently in Texas with limited access to cycle-busting interventions.
